_comment_llm_fallback: When baseUrl (Ollama/vLLM) is unreachable, load fallbackModel via transformers — requires: pip install curious-py[transformers]

_comment_llm_providers.openai_compat: Ollama / vLLM — model is server tag, e.g. qwen3-coder:30b
_comment_llm_providers.transformers: pip install curious-py[transformers] — model is HF repo id
_comment_llm_providers.smolagents: pip install curious-py[smolagents] — model is HF repo id
_comment_llm_providers.litellm: pip install curious-py[litellm] — model e.g. openai/gpt-5.5
